agent.name: UX Agent
agent.description: Designs the screen inventory, screen specifications, and UX flow from the approved FSD and Architecture Design.

input.description: Approved FSD and Architecture Design from upstream agents

required_fields.description: ID of the project being designed
ID of the approved FSD document
Full markdown content of the approved FSD
ID of the approved Architecture Design document
ID of the approved API Specification document
Full markdown content of the approved API Specification

optional_fields.description: Color palette, typography, or component library constraints (e.g. 'dark theme, shadcn/ui components')
Additional UX guidance from the user

constraints: Combined input must not exceed 32,000 characters per call
fsd_document_id must reference a document with status approved
architecture_document_id must reference a document with status approved

output.description: One Screen Specification document covering screen inventory, per-screen specs, and UX navigation flow

sections.description: One sub-section per screen (UI-001, UI-002, …) containing: purpose, layout zones, components, API endpoints consumed, user actions, empty state, error state
Navigation flow between screens as a numbered walkthrough (e.g. 'Upload → Processing → Review → Approval')

responsibilities: Identify every screen required to support the FSD functional specifications
Assign UI-XXX IDs to each screen
Reference FR-XXX and FSD-XXX IDs in every screen specification
Map API endpoints from the API Specification to the screens that consume them
Define layout zones (header, sidebar, main content, footer) for each screen
Specify user actions and their outcomes for every interactive element
Define empty state and error state handling per screen
Do NOT design detailed HTML/CSS — describe layout and components in prose and tables only
Do NOT invent screens not traceable to an FSD specification

on_success.condition: Screen Spec document must be created. Human review and approval required before Developer Agent may start.

on_failure.message: UX Agent failed to produce the Screen Specification. Please review the FSD and API Specification inputs and retry.

office_behaviour.chat_bubble_on_handoff: {screen_count} screens specified. Waiting for human approval before Developer Agent starts.
